steps.title: Name the cause of cooling
steps.content: The sentence says the mushrooms were cooler than the surrounding air, and the team connected that difference to water evaporating from the mushrooms. The blank needs a verb meaning credited an effect to a cause.

steps.title: Choose the cause verb
steps.content: A means reluctantly admitted, not identified a cause. B means recommended or ordered. D means revised or corrected. The remaining verb means assigned a cause or explanation to something, which fits the water-evaporation relationship. The answer is C.
